originContent: ## Security
translatedContent: ## Security

originContent: OpenClaw agents run on your hardware with access to your files and services. Follow these best practices:
translatedContent: OpenClaw agents run on your hardware with access to your files and services. Follow these best practices:

originContent: | Risk | Mitigation |
translatedContent: | Risk | Mitigation |

originContent: | Exposed gateway | Bind to `localhost` only. Use SSH tunneling for remote access. Never expose port 18789 to the internet. |
translatedContent: | Exposed gateway | Bind to `localhost` only. Use SSH tunneling for remote access. Never expose port 18789 to the internet. |

originContent: | API key leaks | Store keys in `.env` files. Add `.env` to `.gitignore`. Rotate keys regularly. |
translatedContent: | API key leaks | Store keys in `.env` files. Add `.env` to `.gitignore`. Rotate keys regularly. |

originContent: | Malicious skills | Only install skills from ClawHub verified publishers. Review SKILL.md before installing. |
translatedContent: | Malicious skills | Only install skills from ClawHub verified publishers. Review SKILL.md before installing. |

originContent: | Prompt injection | Set strict `## Rules` in SOUL.md. Limit file system access. Disable shell commands for untrusted inputs. |
translatedContent: | Prompt injection | Set strict `## Rules` in SOUL.md. Limit file system access. Disable shell commands for untrusted inputs. |

originContent: | Unattended agents | Use HEARTBEAT.md with scope limits. Set budget caps. Enable logging for all actions. |
translatedContent: | Unattended agents | Use HEARTBEAT.md with scope limits. Set budget caps. Enable logging for all actions. |

originContent: **Recent security resources:**
